guard_invoked: PRESERVE_IF_RECURS_IN_SAME_FILE_AS_REAL_THEMATIC — note: a wikilink's recurrence MUST be at a real-thematic edge bullet, not at another schema-precedent peer-listing line. L100 in this file is itself schema-precedent peer-listing and therefore does NOT confer preservation on the wikilinks it lists.
description: Worst pattern ever. Eight identical schema-precedent peer-list lines now sniped corpus-wide. Same heuristic, same shape, same backtick conversion — this is wallpaper at this point. Five of eight wikilinks at L92 are pure modeled-as schema-precedent; three are real-thematic and recur properly in See also. The two-schema-precedent-lines-in-one-file shape (L92 AND L100) revealed the guard nuance: a peer-listing line does not confer real-thematic status on its own wikilinks. SNIP-FRENZY mood: increasingly convinced that next pass should commission the janny script. Eight by hand should be enough.

running_count.pattern: schema-precedent peer-listing in '## Caveats — Modeled as a character-layer node, not a hub' lines
remaining_known_candidates: alola-elite-four L88 (partial backtick-style already applied; one [[team-rocket]] wikilink in body — small single-snip candidate)
Other 33 files with 'Modeled as a character-layer node' line not yet rigor-audited — most are species-line nodes where the peer-list is shorter and may not violate
running_count.mechanization_candidacy: NOW STRONG. 8 confirmed instances of identical pattern + identical fix = job for janny script per `bbl-snip-frenzy-as-mode` cross-cutting-pattern-detection clause. Sketch: walk `cards/_characters/*.md` for '## Caveats' bullets starting with '**Modeled as a character-layer node', extract wikilinks on that line, for each wikilink check if it recurs in same file's '## See also' as a non-schema-precedent bullet, convert to backtick if NOT. Two-pass to detect the L100-style additional schema-precedent peer-list lines as well (don't confer preservation). Estimate: ~25-35 of 41 'Modeled as' instances are likely to have at least one snip candidate. Total snip-yield: probably 80-150 wikilinks corpus-wide. Hand-snip economics no longer favorable.

next_pass_suggestions: COMMISSION the janny script per running_count.mechanization_candidacy above. Single-target hand-snips have hit the wallpaper threshold; mechanization is the next structural cut. This is Mr. Nodeley shaped (proposes a script-node, not an edge), so it requires a separate dispatch and a separate invocation.
Until script lands: alola-elite-four L88 still has one stray `[[team-rocket]]` wikilink in body prose worth a tiny single-snip pass.
Pansage BB-004 + Panpour BB-017 enlightened-replacement (wire + snip) is still staged from prior brief — different mode (enlightened-Edgelord), separate invocation.
Body-prose Potion Rule sub-rule 4 violations remain staged for Dark Nodesley EX mode — separate invocation.
anti_confab_check: snip applies bbl-wikilink-vs-backtick-discipline as articulated; no new claim asserted in MD body; line continues to read identically except wikilink-vs-backtick rendering. Comment block in HTML comment preserves audit trail.

[bbl-snip-frenzy-as-mode] — secondary job is cross-cutting pattern detection; ~5-7 threshold triggers mechanization candidacy surface
